title: Shot Glasses 30x Plastic Mini Durable Reusable Party Cups - Small Sample Tasting Cups for Birthdays, Weddings, BBQ, Parties (Pack of 30)
features: Premium Material: The high-quality handy drinking cups are made up of recyclable polystyrene plastic. Cup wall thickening design, smooth cup mouth without damaging mouth. Small and exquisite, cost-effective

Versatile Cup: Whether it's for serving all types of shots, including liquor and flavoured beverages, or for oils, medicine powder, crafting, resin casting, and much more, this crystal clear cup can cover all needs.

Many Different Uses - These little shot glasses makes for perfect drinkware outside! Great for patio, poolside, picnic, great for shots top shelf liqueurs served on-the-rocks. These cups are also great as Tiny punch cups at your reception drink stations.
PACK DETAILS & USES : The plastic shot glasses pack contains 30 shot glasses 30 ml each that are easily stack-able to save space for convenient storage.Ideal pack to be used at home,pubs or bars.

DURABLE & EASY TO CARRY: Plastic cups are ideal when catering for big numbers great for entertaining during the festive season to use at home It can be taken in travelling Folded rolled rim for comfortable drinking Perfect For Setting Drinking Games.
